---
title: "ENISA ECSF v1"
subtitle: "European Cybersecurity Skills Framework"
jurisdiction: "EU"
framework-type: "Workforce"
organizing-units: 12
elements: 390
license: "ENISA re-use notice"
date: 2026-05-08
categories: [workforce, eu]
---

## At a glance

| | |
|---|---|
| Steward | European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) |
| Canonical page | [European Cybersecurity Skills Framework](https://www.enisa.europa.eu/topics/skills-and-competences/skills-development/european-cybersecurity-skills-framework) |
| Version | 1 |
| Released | 2022-09-19 |
| Source format | PDF report with companion JSON and XLSX |
| License | Subject to ENISA's re-use notice. Verify against the source artefact |
| `framework_summary` slug | `ecsf-v1` |

## Structure in cybed: terms

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<figure class="schema-diagram">
<button type="button" class="toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Toggle schema names for all elements"><span class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span><span class="toggle-text">schema names</span></button>
<svg viewBox="0 0 440 320" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="ecsf-structure-title">
  <title id="ecsf-structure-title">ENISA ECSF structural mapping</title>
  <defs><marker id="ecsf-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/></marker></defs>
  <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.55">
    <line x1="220" y1="58" x2="220" y2="100" marker-end="url(#ecsf-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="220" y1="180" x2="220" y2="222" marker-end="url(#ecsf-arrow)"/>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Framework">
    <rect x="140" y="20" width="160" height="40" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="220" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Framework</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">ecsf:Framework</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Profile">
    <rect x="60" y="100" width="320" height="80" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.16)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="220" y="146" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Profile</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">ecsf:Profile</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="146" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:Role</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="163" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:OrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="KSA">
    <rect x="140" y="222" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="220" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">KSA</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="247" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">ecsf:KSA</text>
    <text class="lt" x="220" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Framework-to-profile connection">
    <text class="ep" x="228" y="84" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">contains</text>
    <text class="et" x="228" y="84" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasOrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Profile-to-element connection">
    <text class="ep" x="228" y="206" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="228" y="206" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
</svg>
<figcaption>Click any box or edge label to flip between plain English and the technical schema name.</figcaption>
</figure>
```

:::

## Counts

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| Profiles | 12 |
| Strict elements | 390 |
| With-examples elements | 390 |
| Elements per profile | 32.5 |

## Provenance

::: {.provenance-cards .column-page}

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-archive"/></svg>

**Source**

ENISA's ECSF reference document.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-gear"/></svg>

**Ingestion**

`scripts/010-ingest-ecsf.R` parses the structure into the cybed schema.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-license"/></svg>

**License**

ENISA's re-use notice governs redistribution. The package does not bundle ECSF source text. Users stage it locally.
:::

:::

## Caveats

- ECSF profiles point at the European e-Competence Framework (e-CF) at fine granularity, but those **cross-references are not expanded into RDF triples**. Full ECSF coverage requires consulting the source's e-CF pointers directly.
- ECSF is **aspirational by design**. The framework was authored as a high-level interoperability frame across European cybersecurity workforce vocabularies, not as a hiring-grade enumeration like NICE or DCWF. Per-profile element counts read low because the framework is intentionally light at this layer.
- The ingested data reflects ENISA's **published export at retrieval time**. Re-run the ingestion script against a newer export to pick up subsequent versions.

## Related

- [NICE Framework v2](nice-v2.qmd), the closest workforce peer at a
  different specificity tier.
- [Cross-framework density spread](../queries/density-spread.qmd)
- [The vocabulary](../concepts/vocabulary.qmd)
